title: zornia cearensis
intro: Zornia cearensis, also known as cearense, is a plant species of the genus Zornia, native to Brazil. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and fever. Zornia cearensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
